response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 15-year experience minimum and shows strong hands-on engineering breadth across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus entrepreneurial experience as a founder. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position, and the resume shows limited demonstrated AI expertise (only recent MCP/agent-tooling work), no advanced AI degree, no recognized AI products or platforms, and no evidence of engineering leadership at the principal/director scope or of advising strategic customers.
strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Founder experience (GISCollective) demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and product ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, plus strong testing and craftsmanship practices
concerns: No demonstrated track record of recognized AI expertise or AI-powered products at scale
Career has stayed at senior/staff IC level with no evidence of director-level strategic or organizational influence
Limited cloud platform strategy experience; background skews toward implementation rather than advising executives and partners

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth vs. role requirements
